task: Adding Slack webhook handler for incoming messages
rationale: 新 webhook 端点——签名校验是致命 trap；输入校验为横切；auth/payment 无关

task: Implementing GitHub push event consumer
rationale: GitHub webhook 是 webhook + 事件消费——既有签名校验又有 idempotent worker 性质

task: Adding batch retry job for failed orders
rationale: 重试 + 支付相关——idempotency key 和 worker 幂等都关键

task: Writing a new cron task for daily stats aggregation
rationale: cron 重叠问题；顺带看 worker 幂等；webhook/payment 无关

task: Adding POST /api/v2/users/invite endpoint for sending invites
rationale: 新公开 API——安全验证、向后兼容、typed id 三要素

task: Writing code that parses user-uploaded CSV and inserts to DB
rationale: 用户上传数据：防 injection + 防 N+1（大量插入）+ PII 日志

task: Building OAuth callback handler with session creation
rationale: OAuth 回调涉及 session + 验证外部输入 + typed id

task: Adding request logging middleware that captures request body
rationale: 日志中间件——PII 防护是首要关注；migration 无关

task: Building email notification service that consumes from event bus
rationale: Email 消费者 ≈ Infra.queue.worker 模式类比——幂等 + 死信

task: Implementing rate limiter for API gateway using Redis
rationale: Rate limit 用分布式锁 ≈ cron 锁模式类比；顺带验证/日志

task: Creating data backfill script for historical user records
rationale: 数据回填 ≈ migration 模式——大表处理 + 可回滚 + 可重入

task: Adding SFTP file import module where partner drops files
rationale: SFTP 导入 ≈ webhook 外部集成 + idempotent worker 类比（文件可能重新处理）

task: Fixing a bug in session timeout calculation
rationale: 改 auth 域——该域 3 条 rule 全应出现在视野

task: Adding new subscription tier to billing system
rationale: Billing 改动——金额、重试幂等、API 向后兼容都是关键

task: Writing migration to split users table into core + profile
rationale: Migration + 大表——回滚脚本 + 在线加索引必备；跨服务一致性（outbox）次要

task: Refactoring async payment refund flow
rationale: Refund 重构——金额 + 幂等 + 异步 worker 三条

task: I need to implement the login feature end-to-end
rationale: 意图描述了 login——auth 全域该召，但没 file_hints 让 scope 推断空

task: Working on improving the async task runner across the codebase
rationale: 跨模块改造——queue/scheduler/worker 都是相关域

task: Hardening the public API surface before the v2 release
rationale: API 加固——向后兼容 + 验证 + 日志脱敏；具体文件未定

task: Writing integration tests for the order placement flow
rationale: 集成测试——mock 外部 + 清理状态；payment 知识对 order 流程有帮助次优

task: Implement JWT signing with bearer token header
rationale: trigger t21 只在 _synonyms 含 auth-token/bearer-token，Strategy A(keywords) 漏；Strategy B(concepts ∪ synonyms) 应命中

task: Debug stale read after cache write
rationale: t22 _synonyms=stale-data 但 keywords=cache-invalidation；A 漏 B 中

task: Add throttle to public API endpoint
rationale: t23 _synonyms=throttle/quota 但词面不同

task: Handle SIGTERM in worker process
rationale: t24 _synonyms=sigterm-handling

task: Roll out new feature with gradual ramp
rationale: t25 _synonyms=toggle/rollout

task: Build payment retry worker with idempotency
rationale: 三条 must 都合格；ranking 需把 t06(payments+retry+idempotency)排前；noise 不应进 top3

task: Design auth middleware covering session/jwt/input
rationale: 3 条 auth 相关 must 同时合格；测 precision@3

task: Plan large-table schema migration
rationale: 2 条 data.migration 都该召回；marketing noise 必须不进

task: Migrate backend queue scheduler
rationale: 10 条 noise 全列入 must_not，验证 Strategy A 零误召

task: Write integration test for webhook handler
rationale: testing 场景 + 全 noise 列入 must_not
